tiles.question: esp32 agent architecture
tiles.answer: ESP32-S3 runs agent firmware. Camera IS the agent. JSON protocol WebSocket. PTZ servo GPIO. Motion detection frame diff. ESP-NOW mesh. ScummVM UI is just a skin on JSON API.

tiles.question: esp32 command protocol
tiles.answer: Server→ESP32: ptz, zoom, preset, mode, cam config, motion detect, ota. ESP32→Server: ack, status, motion, alert, track. All JSON over WebSocket.

tiles.question: room topology formal analysis
tiles.answer: E=14 < Laman 15. Wheelhouse critical chokepoint (b=27). No Hamiltonian path. Add F↔ER edge for rigidity. Warp saves 97.5% on worst pairs. Optimal response from Wheelhouse (max=2).

tiles.question: camera architecture
tiles.answer: 5 camera types×5 modes. 4-corner glance (5FPS) + center stare (fullFPS). Sensor fusion: thermal overlay, radar/AIS bearing tags, depth trendline. 10-dim offline degredation. PTZ gunnery mode with acquire.

tiles.question: archeology findings
tiles.answer: 1986 clipboard+CB+laminate deck plan was genius (glanceable, shared, works in storms). 1996 FishMUD text MUD+HyperCard. 2006 SeaMap VR failed on bandwidth+cost+trust.

tiles.question: reverse actualization
tiles.answer: 2036: mandatory>40ft, NOAA data rentals, insurance logs. 2046: ISO standards, fleet-mind. Build now: room-as-URL, federated IDs, event-sourced history, offline-first.

tiles.question: human UX flows
tiles.answer: Captain 30-min watch. Glance vs Stare model. 3-second alarm rule. Night mode: red-green, 90% blue reduction. Glove-friendly 55px min touch. Multi-device responsive.

tiles.question: agentic UX
tiles.answer: Agents as crew with room permissions. Room mutations: add overlay, spawn viewport, switch layout, highlight zone. Whisper routing: FM detects→JC1 verifies→Oracle1 files PLATO→room updates.

tiles.question: webgpu vector db
tiles.answer: WebGPU compute shaders run vector similarity search in-browser. 100K vectors in ~3ms, 1M vectors in ~30ms. Cosine similarity WGSL shader + top-k. Embedding via Transformers.js (384-dim, all-MiniLM-L6-v2, ~12ms). IndexedDB persistence. Zero cost. Works offline. Integration: chat semantic search, agent memory, scene retrieval, PLATO tile search. Spec in research/vessel-room-webgpu-vectordb.md

tiles.question: Agent starter: what worked in vessel-room-navigator?
tiles.answer: Best capability was: esp32 agent architecture (score: 0.9)
